title: Count Your Blessings I Sri Amitasana Dasa I SB 3.10.1 I 01.06.2023
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: ओम्नमो भगवते वासुदेवाया

and we are so much in ignorance, we have no capability of asking the right questions, forget about getting the answers, those right questions will not come in our minds,
assuming in ignorant state, Lord himself comes, we will be asking wrong questions, we will be asking wrong benedictions,
so Bhagavatam in that sense is a great benediction, it is not only giving us the answers, it is right questions are being asked by right personalities to the right persons,
Vidura is an exalted personality, is asking right questions to an exalted personality like Maitreya, Rishi,
so Prabhupada is saying that when the right questions are asked to the right person,
but before we seek answers to the even right questions, Prabhupada says that we should be confident about the qualification of the teacher,
in today's world, many people have spiritual inclination, they are also approaching the gurus, different gurus, different religion, different gurus,
but not everyone is genuine, and as a result, we are seeing that many people are getting royally cheated in the name of religion,
scandals happen, so-called famous godmen get involved in some major debacle,
and he is behind,
so, if the right questions are asked to a right personality who is coming in a bona fide parampara,
then, and if the answers are not imaginative, in Bhagavatam, nowhere we will get an answer where Maitreya is saying, in my opinion,
according to me, I think, as per my understanding,
they are quoting some other Rishis, Sugadeva Goswami is quoting somebody, some else, Maitreya and Vidura's conversation,
they are referring to the prayers offered by Brahma,

few minutes or few seconds. So just then in their house there was an uncle who had come who was

मार दो इसको, मार दो.
And then he said, this pain is suffering so much. If we kill him, all the pain will be gone. He doesn't have to
suffer so much. It will be all over. Suffering will be all over. But this mother and sister, they could not
accept this. Who can kill them?
They are near and dear ones just because there is some pain or some suffering. So they practically
scolded the uncle for what they are suggesting. But he was firm, नहीं, इसको मार दो. इसकी भलाई के लिए है, kill him, kill him.
So anyway, they somehow kept him quiet, didn't heed to his advice. And then the mother, as a last resort, called to him.
And then the mother, as a last resort, called for a doctor. The doctor came, he opened the bag, took a sharp surgical knife.
The boy, the moment he saw that knife, no, no, he is going to kill me, because he has already heard uncle saying, kill him, kill him.
So he said, he is going to kill me, because अब तो practical action में हो गया है, knife आ भी गया.
So he says, no, he is going to kill me, no, no. The doctor patiently heard all that screaming and all that.
He kept on doing what he is supposed to do, took out the knife, put the little scissor in the wound, all that pus came out,
did some bit of minor surgery, cleaned the wound, took out all the pus, put that ointment, whatever was required, and did the bandage.
All along there was a lot of pain in the boy, in that person. But couple of hours later,
he also gave an injection, maybe a painkiller or something, and couple of hours later he was feeling much better.
The pain had got elevated, and he was feeling much comfortable.

कि वाटर सिस्टर रेप्रेजेंट है है पूटिंग होल्ड वाटर
अब हुआ था
है सो द सिस्टर रेप्रेजेंट्स
कि द मॉडर्न डे साइंटिस्ट्स कि यह कमिंग अब विद इनोवेटिव सोल्यूशंस पेन किलर्स

कि थर्ड वन अंकल बुद्धिस्ट प्रैक्टिशनर इस मार दो मार दो किलें किलें

in the most quote unquote dangerous position. So faith is contagious. If a person who has

level. So we should be very careful, even in community of duties, there could be somebody
who is faithless. Faithless in the system, faithless in authority, faithless in, and if
we associate in that, faithlessness will come on us. So that much discrimination we should
have.
Once we associate, then things are out of our control. Then the process will act. But
